policy: These paths are exclusively managed by the PublishingPipeline (backend/publishing/pipeline.py). No agent, script, or direct edit may write to them without the [publish] commit marker or publish: prefix.
enforcement: scripts/hooks/pre-commit — blocks staged changes without publish marker
scripts/hooks/commit-msg — blocks commit messages without [publish] or publish:
bypass_policy: --no-verify is FORBIDDEN. Escalate to the Conductor if blocked.
